name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Per-room per-day extras: unified items system replaces Stored Extras + booking-level items. DB v20.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.08: Unified extras system — items can be per-room per-day (or booking-level). Removed separate Stored Extras section. Room + Date columns on Extras & Charges table. Add items with room/date selectors, no page reload per item. DB version 20.
  • 1.9.2.07: Item catalog — CSV import of Square items, dropdown selector on booking page auto-fills price, custom item fallback. DB version 19.
